# audiolab — Contents

*Parallel to `cld: Audio Hi-Fi Contents` in Google Drive.*
*Both generated by Claude Chat → Claude Code pipe, March 2026.*

## This Repo

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `docs/contents.md` | This file |
| `docs/acoustic_workflow.md` | Measurement workflow: impedance → free-field → in-room → correction |
| `docs/chamber_hifi.md` | Chamber hi-fi acoustic measurements and characterisation |
| `docs/dynamic_range.md` | Dynamic range and noise floor notes |
| `docs/gdrive/` | Cached markdown copies of Google Drive audio documents |
| `audiolab/` | Python measurement tool — devices, capture, analysis, generator, curses UI |
| `calibrate_mic.py` | Microphone calibration script |
